chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Khalid Al-Qasri

text: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن خالد القسريّ فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رحمه اللّه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن حفصة، عن‌ محمّد بن خالد بن عبد اللّه البجليّ القسريّ و هو كوفيّ عربيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Khalid Al-Qasri has been transmitted by me from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Hafsah, from Muhammad ibn Khalid ibn Abdullah Al-Bajali Al-Qasri, who was an Arab from Kufa.
